creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
> /usr/local/lib:
> -r--r--r--   1 root  wheel  98340 May 19 08:27 libcnews.a
> As you can tell its a recent build on bento, I think the newsspool dir was
> from an old build.

This file is not created by the nntp-port,
but it is a left over from pkg_add cnews-cr.tgz

I found old "exec" lines in the port,
and added the right unexec lines.

kind regards Dirk

- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany
